title: Persha
content:
{{Top|fga|leg}} {{Character |type= |image= |name=Persha |homeworld=[[Galantos]]''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]'' |birth= |death= |species=[[Fian/Legends|Fian]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]]{{Fact}} |pronouns=She/her{{Fact}} |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=[[Government of Galantos|Governmental body of Galantos]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|I am Primate Persha. On the behalf of Councilor Jobath, I'd like to welcome you to Galantos, Leia Organa Solo, Han Solo, Tahiri Veila, Jagged Fel, and protocol droid See-Threepio.|Persha welcomes the group from the Galactic Alliance|}} '''Persha''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Fian/Legends|Fian]] who served as the [[Primate (Yevethan rank)|Primate]] of [[Al'solib'minet'ri City]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Galantos]]. Fian Councilor [[Jobath Knox]] tasked Persha with greeting [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] and [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], along with the rest of a group of individuals representing the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]], when they visited Galantos in [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]]. Persha handed off responsibility of the guests' welfare to [[Assistant Primate]] [[Thrum]] after the initial welcoming. ==Biography== {{Quote|We have made our finest diplomatic facilities available and will strive to fulfill your every request.|Persha|}} [[File:Fia.jpg|thumb|right|175px|A Fian, Persha's species]] A [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Fian/Legends|Fian]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Galantos]] near the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]], Persha achieved the rank of [[Primate (Yevethan rank)|Primate]] of [[Al'solib'minet'ri City]]{{CSWECite|III|21|Persha}} by the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]].''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]'' to [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]]. At that [[Time/Legends|time]], [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy's]] most prominent government, the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], had fallen during an [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion]] by the [[Yuuzhan Vong galaxy|extra-galactic]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]], and the New Republic's successor, the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]], was still engaged with the invaders. That year, the Fia decided to make a deal with the Yuuzhan Vong to eliminate the threat of the nearby [[Speciesism|xenophobic]] [[Yevetha]] [[Species/Legends|species]], and the Yuuzhan Vong [[Destruction of N'zoth|fulfilled]] their part of the deal. Because of the Fia's pact with the invaders, communications with the Galactic Alliance were taken down, leaving the other government no idea as to what had transpired on Galantos. Due to the communication blackout in the area of Galantos and a tip from the information-collecting [[Ryn Network]], a small Galactic Alliance task force, headed primarily by former New Republic [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] and her [[Marriage/Legends|husband]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], arrived at Galantos to check on the problem. Fian Councilor [[Jobath Knox]] panicked when he learned that representatives from the Galactic Alliance were coming to Galantos, and, fearing that their pact with the Yuuzhan Vong might be discovered, Knox had Persha deal with greeting the guests on their [[Government of Galantos|government's]] behalf instead. Along with a crowd of other Fia, Persha received the members of the Galactic Alliance entourage—consisting of Organa Solo, her husband, [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Tahiri Veila]], [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Jagged Fel]], and the [[3PO-series protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]]—when they landed in Al'solib'menit'ri [[City/Legends|City]] in the [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|freighter]] [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] and a [[Nssis-class Clawcraft|clawcraft]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]]. Covering Knox's absence with an excuse of other engagements, Persha led the Galactic Alliance representatives to their [[Al'solib'minet'ri City diplomatic suites|guest suites]] while giving them all of the necessary information about their visit. After leaving the group, Persha also panicked and had [[Assistant Primate]] [[Thrum]] deal with the representatives instead. In the end, however, the Galactic Alliance group learned that the Fia had made a deal with the Yuuzhan Vong, though the Fia's allies turned on them soon after the arrival of the Galactic Alliance task force. [[Twin Suns Squadron]] and the [[Lancer-class frigate/Legends|''Lancer''-class frigate]] [[Pride of Selonia (Lancer-class)|''Pride of Selonia'']], both of the Galactic Alliance, helped [[Battle of Galantos|defeat]] a Yuuzhan Vong [[Battle group/Legends|battle group]] that had been sent to [[Slavery/Legends|enslave]] the Fia, and the population of Galantos was saved. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|Councilor Jobath could not attend?''"
"''Unfortunately, no. He had a pressing engagement in Gal'fian'deprisi City.|Leia Organa Solo and Persha|}} As a Fia, Persha was long-featured and had webbed [[Limb/Legends|feet]] and lengthy arms. She had a [[Music/Legends|musical]] voice that was high pitched, and she tended to talk quite a lot. During the welcoming of the representatives of the Galactic Alliance, Persha kept up a steady stream of details about the newcomers' stay as they were brought to their quarters. Like Jobath Knox, Persha rid herself of the representatives as soon as possible to cover up as best she could the details of the Fia's pact with the Yuuzhan Vong. ==Behind the scenes== Persha first appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|''The New Jedi Order'']] installment ''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]'', by [[Shane Dix]] and [[Sean Williams]]. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]'' {{1st}} *[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant (abridged audiobook)|''The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant'' abridged audiobook]] ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Persha |es=Persha }} [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Fia]] [[Category:Government figures]]
